scope_check.evidence: Reviewed schema artifacts stayed within the assigned review-report policy scope.

goal_contract_check.evidence: The review artifact matches the schema-policy goal contract and required report fields.

question_fulfillment.evidence: The requested schema-policy review scope is covered.

functional_completeness.evidence: Required policy fields and report sections are present.

scenario_flow_coverage.evidence: Review acceptance and rework scenario flows were inspected.

edge_case_handling.evidence: Hard-gate and recommendation edge cases were reviewed.

verification_completeness.evidence: Syntax and lint-style checks are recorded with command evidence.

scenario_flow_scores.evidence: Accepted review flow was checked against threshold and blocking-gate requirements.

build.evidence: No build command exists for this schema-policy-only artifact.

lint.evidence: `node scripts/lint-schema-docs.mjs` passed markdown and required-key checks.

test.evidence: `node scripts/parse-fixtures.mjs` parsed JSON, JSONL, and YAML review fixtures.

run.evidence: No runnable app exists for this schema-policy-only artifact.

behavior_check.evidence: Manual behavior check inspected accepted, rejected, and rework gate documentation flows.

ux_workflow_completeness.evidence: This schema-policy review has no app workflow surface to inspect.

visual_polish.evidence: This schema-policy review has no app visual surface to inspect.

responsive_desktop_mobile.evidence: This schema-policy review has no desktop or mobile app surface to inspect.

accessibility_basics.evidence: This schema-policy review has no interactive app controls to inspect.

error_loading_empty_states.evidence: This schema-policy review has no app loading, empty, error, or validation states.

text_overlap_layout_stability.evidence: This schema-policy review has no app text layout surface to inspect.

domain_fit.evidence: This schema-policy review has no product domain vocabulary to inspect.

evidence.description: App-quality evidence is not required for this non-app schema-policy review.

security_check.evidence: No raw secrets, workspace escape, unauthorized network, or external-cost behavior is present.

secret_scan_result.evidence: Secret scan found no API keys or credential-like values in reviewed fixtures.

scope_diff_result.evidence: Changed artifacts are within the agreed schema-policy review scope.

command_audit.output_summary: JSON, JSONL, and YAML fixture parsing passed.

risks_or_follow_up: This fixture must fail because recommendation accepted cannot be paired with a security_failed status.
